script:
python3 -c "
import importlib.util, dis, sys, io
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('aixa_responder', '/home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py')
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print('===== mod.post_reply =====')
print(f'  qualname: {mod.post_reply.__qualname__}')
print(f'  co_filename: {mod.post_reply.__code__.co_filename}')
print(f'  co_firstlineno: {mod.post_reply.__code__.co_firstlineno}')
print(f'  co_names: {mod.post_reply.__code__.co_names}')
print(f'  closure: {mod.post_reply.__closure__}')
print()
print('===== dis(post_reply) =====')
buf = io.StringIO(); dis.dis(mod.post_reply, file=buf); print(buf.getvalue())
print('===== dis(_post_reply_orig_protect) =====')
buf = io.StringIO(); dis.dis(mod._post_reply_orig_protect, file=buf); print(buf.getvalue())
print('===== dis(_redact_passwords_protect) =====')
buf = io.StringIO(); dis.dis(mod._redact_passwords_protect, file=buf); print(buf.getvalue()[:1500])
"
